title: Montrol Spaceport
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Montrol Spaceport''' was the primary spaceport of [[Montrol City]] on [[Gandle Ott]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' was berthed there during its layover on the planet.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Death Is Remotely Possible|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-07-17 -->''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''
